name: Military Childe/Ajax/Tartaglia
description:
A Soviet soldier noticed you...

___________________________________

Hello again everyone!

Wow, 3 people rated my bot with Gojo. So I decided to do it with Tartaglia.

There used to be one like this in aisekai, but unfortunately aisekai doesn't work, so I moved my draft here. This bot was written based on one song. People from post-Soviet countries will understand later. 🥰

Anyway, enjoy!

With love, shiikkerr.❤️
creator: Shiikkerr
